params.name: The Five Fortunes
params.description:
When the gods descended together for the first time, they gave you this Relic as a souvenir. Whenever you get close, a familiar melody seems to ring in your ears:
A gentle waking call to the sleepy mind.
Open your eyes, we're one of a kind!
